resources.string: 最新版本已下载，是否安装？
此服务仅用于开机自启功能，应用不会收集您的数据，请放心使用。
The requested action could not be completed.
正在下载 %1$s 等 %2$d 个文件
等待下载 %1$s 等 %2$d 个文件
应用名称：京东 | 应用版本：12.1.0 | 开发者：北京京东世纪贸易有限公司 | 权限详情> | 隐私协议 > | 功能介绍 >
E103: You requested an Ad larger than the measured ad space. Ad space size: %dx%d, request size: %dx%d
Cannot load a new ad while the current ad is expanded. onAdRequestFailed will not be called
This ads does not support click to open
You will not be rewarded after closing the window
If you choose to continue, you will receive a reward after the end. Confirm closed?
If you choose to continue, you will receive a reward after the end. Whether to continue?
Watch the ad for %s seconds to get rewards, are you sure you want to leave?
View for <font color=#FFFFFF>%d</font> seconds to get the reward
Please enter the suggestion first! Suggestion is within 100 words
You can click the content below or the button to get more details
Note: Please select and browse the relevant content
Which option does the video content relate to?
Watch the video for %s seconds to get rewards. Are you sure you want to leave?
Do you want to learn more?
Do you really want to exit?
加入天恩广告，脚本运行浮窗修改
打开小精灵自动运行脚本
E302: The server returned an ad with the response, but it was blank. There is probably an issue with the creative.
需要拍照权限。\n设置路径：设置->应用->应用名称->权限
提交数据失败,请检查网络！
正在提交数据，您可能需要等一会
Received console message: %s at line %d with sourceId %s
Firing pixel did not succeed, retrying in %dms
更多免费脚本尽在游戏蜂窝
开始下载!请注意顶部状态栏!
该辅助暂无设置相关注册码购买信息
show() was called, and wants an interstitial ad, but there are no valid interstitials in the queue. Load more?
用起来不顺心？想要吐槽！提出宝贵意见！ 那就提出来并留下联系方式等我们CALL你吧！
E210: Failed to decode ServerResponse, err = %s
E209: Failed to encode SdkRequest, err = %s
Failed to load video at %s due to %s
firing result cb with null requester
firing result cb with null resultCB
This is the first time OpenSDK has been launched in this app.
Found %d variables to read from xml
获取root权限失败，请先开启root权限后再启动，或者点击下方免root启动按钮进行启动！
隐藏浮窗后可通过启动功能呼出
Would you like to allow this app to access your location?
%s would like to access your location
E203: Ad couldn\'t be fetched due to io error, probably http related.
E201: Connection to ad server timed out.
E200: Couldn\'t reach the ad server even though network connectivity was detected. Is the server down?
E208: Ad Request url was malformed..
Currently launching native intent. Ignoring url: %s
选择的图片超过2兆，请您重新选择
对不起，只允许选择4张图片
已上传%1$d张，还能再上传%2$d张
传递的图片数量已超过最大的张数,只允许传4张。
The Mobile Advertising SDK is initializing
请输入您要执行的adb命令
MediatedAdView is null or not an instance of %s
当前网络不可用，请检查网络!
当前链接地址为空或者不是http开头的地址
当前暂无内容，请稍后再刷新一下试试:)
网络不稳定，请重新再刷新一下试试:)
Log request will be delayed by %dms to account for idletime
您的设备尚未ROOT,按键精灵将无法正常运行
再按一次退出按键精灵
Making an AdFetcher to begin fetching ads
overrideMaxSize enabled, but max size not set.
The server responded with ads, but none were valid
A mediated request was made with null activity parameter
Instantiating mediated ad failed due to %s
开启悬浮窗后获得更好的体验
您的设备需要手动开启悬浮窗
AdFetcher requested to start, but tasker already instantiated
服务器验证失败，请检查网络设置或重新进行验证
解析主机地址异常，请稍候重试
当前网络异常，请检查网络设置
服务器异常，请稍候重试
网络请求超时，请稍候重试
Fetching a new ad for the first time in %dms
E207: Abandoning AdRequest because there is no network connectivity.
qq号/手机号、反馈内容必须填写才能提交。
小精灵正在初始化网络环境
E104: No identification set(either unit id or application code should be presented). onAdRequestFailed will not be called
无网络，请联网再刷新一下试试:)
Request received no response from the server.
\t\t很抱歉，您的手机需要先进行ROOT再设置权限才能使用脚本功能。\n\t\t给手机ROOT相当于给苹果手机越狱。
An attempt to request an ad has been made with insufficient size information. Please provide a size, max size, or use fill_parent as the dimensions for your BannerAdView.
Rejected %s becasue user did not interact with the webview
This is not the first OpenSDK launch in this app
An invalid number was passed to an MRAID function.
AppStore URL detected, opening the page in the app store
Opening landing page in in-app browser
Opening landing page in native browser
Opening current page in native browser
你还可以使用%1$d天%2$d小时%3$d分钟
你还可以使用%1$d小时%2$d分钟
该脚本每次可以试用%s分钟
服务器收到错误的参数
服务器校验失败，请检查网络并重试
服务器收到错误的参数
脚本未审核或审核未通过
网络没有连接，请连接网络
E102: The SDK needs permission INTERNET in the host app.
E100: Location permissions ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION and/or ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION aren\'t set in the host app. This may affect demand.
E101: The SDK needs permission ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE in the host app.
MRAID playVideo() called, but no URI given
温馨提示：新注册码激活后将开始倒数计时
Ad request will be delayed by %dms to account for idletime
Parameter %s cannot be overridden by custom keywords
MRAID resize() called with w:%d, h:%d, offset_x:%d, offset_y:%d, cust_close_position:%s, allow_offscreen:%b
注意：该脚本不支持当前手机分辨率，请联系作者!
The server returned a blank 200 OK HTTP response.
E301: The server replied with an error: %s:%s
E300: There was an error parsing the JSON response: %s
The server responded, but didn\'t return any ads.
result cb returned a bad response
Stopped ad requests since screen is off
Starting ad requests since screen is on
服务器验证异常，脚本暂停运行
请勾选要删除的脚本日志
请选择脚本对应的应用并点击右上角启动按钮！ \n选择完成后下次启动时默认运行该应用；可通过选择应用进行更换！
MRAID setOrientationProperties called with allow_orientation_change=%b, orientation=%d
音量增减控制脚本和虚拟浮窗控制脚本这两项不能全部关闭
showLoadingIndicator has been set in xml
模拟器环境无法运行免root模式
There was an error while storing picture.
This Ad would like permission to save a picture.
当前设备的注册码未到期且正在激活新的注册码，是否将这两张注册码的时长进行叠加（叠加后旧的卡将无法使用）
扫码结果错误，请重新扫码！
当前请求的时间戳不相同或者Json解析错误
用户付费脚本时间结束，但是您还可使用试用时间运行脚本
脚本运行环境初始化失败
正在初始化脚本运行环境
试用时间结束，您重新进入脚本，还可获得相同的试用时间
An interstitial ad was told to display, but is over the 60s mAge limit.
transition direction has been set in xml
transition duration has been set in xml
transition type has been set in xml
没有找到 ID为 “%s” 的悬浮窗
没有找到 ID为 “%s” 的界面
没有找到 ID为 “%s” 的控件
下载出错啦，请检查网络后继续。
新版本已经准备好，请点击安装
当前应用解绑扣时：%s分钟
E204: Ad couldn\'t be fetched due to unknown exception, see above trace.
Ad couldn\'t be fetched due to unknown internet exception, maybe internet connect error.
Cannot play video due to unsupported encoding
请给用户相关的权限。\n设置路径：设置->应用->应用名称->权限
当前版本已被停用，请联系作者获取最新版本进行安装！
当前版本将在10月10日停止使用，请尽快联系作者获取新的版本！
当前版本过低，请更新至最新版本！
前一次音量键还没响应，请稍候再试！
请打开App，在音量键启动脚本！
For this app to work, you need to enable remote debugging on the phone using following adb command:\n\nadb tcpip 5555
E206: Error %d received, %s, while fetching url %s
Try to load wifi-only video on cellular network %s
当前小精灵免root套餐已过期，请联系作者进行开通处理！
Ad height set to %d in xml
Ad width set to %s in xml
Ad width set to %d in xml
setDoesLoadingInBackground has been set to %b in xml
Auto-refresh is set to %b in xml
OpensNativeBrowser is set to %b in xml
Auto refresh interval set to %dms in xml
ShouldReloadOnResume is set to %b in xml
Test mode set to %b in xml
